title: Jansen, Coetzee back in Test action
description: CRICKET NEWS - Coach Shukri Conrad has named...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Coach Shukri Conrad has named the Proteas XI for the first Test against Sri Lanka at Kingsmead, which starts tomorrow.


> Fit-again captain Temba Bavuma’s return sees Ryan Rickelton drop out.


Fast bowlers Marco Jansen and Gerald Coetzee are also back in the Test team after being rested for the West Indies and Bangladesh series.

As a result, spinner Senuran Muthusamy and pace bowler Dane Paterson miss out on selection.

Proteas XI: Aiden Markram, Tony de Zorzi, Tristan Stubbs, Temba Bavuma (c), David Bedingham, Kyle Verreynne, Wiaan Mulder, Marco Jansen, Gerald Coetzee, Kagiso Rabada, Keshav Maharaj.

The post Jansen, Coetzee back in Test action appeared first on SA Cricketmag.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
